creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated XEmacs21 ports up to version 21.1.10 and also re-dependence
according to rearrange XEmacs packages. All XEmacs packages prepared here
are as follows:

xemacs-packages -----------------> xemacs21 -------------------------+
      |								     |
      +----------------------+---> xemacs21-* --+		     +-> xemacs21-sumo
xemacs-basic-mule-packages --+    (NON-SUMO)	|		     |
xemacs-mule-packages ---------------------------+-> xemacs21-*	     |	    
xemacs-comm-packages ------+			|   (SUMO Mule)	     |
xemacs-games-packages -----+			|		     |
xemacs-libs-packages ------+			|		     |
xemacs-oa-packages --------+-- xemacs-additional-packages -----------+
xemacs-packages -----------+
xemacs-prog-packages ------+
xemacs-wp-packages --------+

Now update ports send-pred here are NON-SUMO ports(xemacs21, xemacs21-*)and
associated XEmacs packages ports(xemacs-packages,
xemacs-basic-mule-packages, xemacs-mule-packages). When you commit these
ports,take care following notice:

Existing xemacs-mule-packages should be move to xemacs-basic-mule-packages

According to this procedure, repositry copy should be done from
xemacs-mule-packages to xemacs-basic-mule-packages.

I put the all shar and diffs below "Fix:"

Fix: Update ports:xemacs21*(editors/xemacs21*, japanese/xemacs21-*) NON-SUMO
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
New port:xemacs-basic-mule-packages-1.0(editors/xemacs-basic-mule-packages)
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/DESCR
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/COMMENT
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/PLIST
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/files/
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/files/md5
#	xemacs-basic-mule-packages/Makefile
#
echo c - xemacs-basic-mule-packages/
mkdir -p xemacs-basic-mule-packages/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/
mkdir -p xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/DESCR'
XStarting with release 21, xemacs does not come with lisp packages
Xany more. Instead, they are distributed separately from the main
Xsources.
X
X    This port provides a basic package with mule for XEmacs(version over 21).
Xwhich contains basically needed packages provided by xemacs.org(www.xemacs.org)
Xin addition to the basic package(editors/xemacs-packages) for usual working at
XXEmacs.
X
XTo install other categories' packages, use editors/xemacs-*-packages
Xports/packages.
END-of-xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/DESCR
echo x - xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/COMMENT'
XBasic XEmacs elisp packages with Mule(basic-mule)
END-of-xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-xemacs-basic-mule-packages/pkg/PLIST'

X# New ports collection makefile for:	Basic XEmacs elisp packages with Mule
X# Date created:		03 June 2000
X# Whom:			KIRIYAMA Kazuhiko<kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp>
X#
X^# $FreeBSD$$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	xemacs-basic-mule-packages
XPORTVERSION=	1.0
XCATEGORIES=	editors elisp
XMASTER_SITES=	\
X		ftp://ftp.xemacs.org/pub/xemacs/packages/ \
X		ftp://ftp.mpi-sb.mpg.de/pub/gnu/mirror/ftp.xemacs.org/xemacs/packages/ \
X		ftp://ftp.usyd.edu.au/pub/Xemacs/packages/ \
X		ftp://ftp.lab.kdd.co.jp/xemacs/packages/ \
X		ftp://ftp.th-darmstadt.de/pub/editors/xemacs/packages/
X
XDISTFILES=	\
X		egg-its-1.22-pkg.tar.gz \
X		elib-1.06-pkg.tar.gz \
X		locale-1.16-pkg.tar.gz \
X		mule-base-1.34-pkg.tar.gz \
X		skk-1.15-pkg.tar.gz
X
XMAINTAINER=	KIRIYAMA Kazuhiko<kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp>
X
XDIST_SUBDIR=	xemacs
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=${DIST_SUBDIR}
X
XNO_BUILD=	yes
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/mule-packages
X
XXEMACSDIR=	${PREFIX}/lib/xemacs
X
Xdo-extract:
X	@${MKDIR} ${WRKSRC}
X.for f in ${DISTFILES}
X	@${EXTRACT_CMD} ${EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS} ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/${f} \
X		${EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS} -C ${WRKSRC}
X.endfor
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${XEMACSDIR}
X	${CP} -Rp ${WRKDIR}/mule-packages ${XEMACSDIR}
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "    This is the basic mule package for XEmacs(version over 21). You might be"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "enough with this package installing basic package(editors/xemacs-packages)"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "altogether for working at XEmacs but if you think it insufficient,you can"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "install other packages provided by XEmacs.org with editors/xemacs-*-packages"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "ports. These ports are prepared for corresponding XEmacs packages except for"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "xemacs-packages, xemacs-basic-packages and xemacs-additional-packages. Where"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "xemacs-additional-packages is a meta ports for packages out of xemacs, xemacs"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "mule-basic and xemacs mule category packages."
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "    You can also install with running it as root and using the 'Manage Packes'"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "menu within the 'Options' menu of the menubar. But using this xemacs package"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "managing, you could not control under ports managing ;-)"
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xemacs-basic-mule-packages/Makefile
exit
